ASBESTOS TRIAL SETTING CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-14-2026 Continued To Feb-18-27 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 502

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
TENTATIVE RULING: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday June 30, 2026, in Department 502, Line 3.

Nancy T. Williams, Esq., of Brayton Purcell LLP's Motion to be Relieved as Counsel for Plaintiff Rebecca Smith is GRANTED. No opposition filed. =(SKF/502).

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
